reasoning: I'm voting for Biswajit Das and the TMC because my Kanyashree has come on time every single month since I started college, my bicycle helped me every day, and every scheme that's reached my hand has a TMC stamp on it. Yes, I've heard about Sandeshkhali and the teacher job corruption—that's wrong and makes me angry. But here's what I know from my own life: the government I voted for in 2019 actually delivered for me and my family. The BJP can talk about all sorts of things, but they haven't given me anything like what Didi has. If my schemes stop coming or my college closes, then I'll think differently. Right now, that hasn't happened.
primary_drivers: Kanyashree stipend arriving reliably every month
Proven track record of TMC scheme delivery versus BJP's absence of comparable benefits
Personal experience matters more than political narratives or corruption stories that don't immediately break the system that helps me
